reviews.name: 홍밥풀
reviews.content:
마침 귀여운 모자 찾고있었는데 크리스마스 느낌 물씬나는 모자가 출시되었네요 ㅋ.ㅋ
곧 다가오는 크리스마스에 ssfw 바라클라바 쓰고 귀여움 뽐낼 수 있게 되었어요!!

배색 포인트가 찰떡궁합이라 완벽해요!! 우리 강쥐 이 모자 쓰니까 정말 요정같아서 귀여워 미치겠어요 ><
보통 바라클라바는 사이즈 조절할 수 없어서 조금 불편했는데 단추랑 끈이 있어서 사이즈 조절 가능해서 좋았어요. 강쥐들이 착용할 때 목졸림 전혀없이 편하게 착용가능하다는 장점이 제일 좋아요! 그리고 모자 안쓸때는 후드 + 목도리로 변해서 겨울에 더 따뜻할 것 같아요!

완전 강추입니다~~~
reviews.content_en: I was looking for a cute hat, and this Christmas-vibed balaclava just came out! 😄 Now I can show off my pup's cuteness wearing the SSFW balaclava for the upcoming Christmas!! The color blocking is absolutely perfect!! When our Kangju wears this hat, he looks like a little fairy and I'm obsessed with how cute he is >< Usually balaclavas don't have size adjustments which was a bit inconvenient, but this one has buttons and drawstrings for sizing, so I love it. The best part is that there's zero choking hazard when the pups wear it—they're super comfortable! And when not wearing it as a hat, it becomes a hoodie + scarf, so it'll be even warmer in winter! Highly recommend!!!

reviews.name: 두부
reviews.content:
핏이 말도 안되는 너무 귀여운 바라클라바..💛
모자 안 좋아하는 강아지일지라도 산책할 때는 뒤로 넘겨서 후드처럼 착용하면 되니까 주인 만족으로라도 구매해야하는 바라클라바에요...!.!.!
reviews.content_en: The fit is insanely cute on this balaclava..💛 Even if your dog doesn't like hats, you can just flip it back when taking a walk and wear it like a hoodie—so you gotta buy this one just to make the owner happy...!.!.!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
입는 순간 요정으로 변신시켜주는 따순 바라클라바에요 🤎
사람들 관심과 사랑을 한몸에 받을 수 있어요 ㅎㅎ
바잇미 x ssfw 아이템은 늘 믿고 구매해요 ! 
말이 필요 없는 비쥬얼˶ 사진으로 봐주세요♡ʾʾ
reviews.content_en: A sweet balaclava that transforms your pup into a fairy the moment you put it on 🤎 Your dog will get all the attention and love from people ㅎㅎ I always trust and buy BITE ME x SSFW items! No words needed—just check out the photos♡ʾʾ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
이 귀여운 강아지를 보세요! 🎅🏻🎄❤️
크리스마스 파티 때 요거 하나면 끝일 것 같아요!
목에 단추랑 리본 멜 수 있는 끈이 있어서 머리가 뽕실한 강아지라면 살짝 여유롭게 구매하셔도 될 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: Look at this adorable pup! 🎅🏻🎄❤️ This one item is all you need for a Christmas party! There are buttons on the neck and a ribbon leash, so if your pup has fluffy hair, you might want to size up a bit for some extra room!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
머리둘레 32 xl 입는 비숑 m 했더니 좀 작네요 ㅠ 
Ssfw 모델 강아지들 체형 좀 다양했음 좋겠어요 매번 2-3키로라 참고가 안돼여
reviews.content_en: My Bichon is size M with a 32cm head circumference, and I got XL but it's a bit small 😢 I wish SSFW would feature more diverse dog body types in their models—I always reference the 2-3kg dogs which doesn't really help

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 넘 이뽀요 구여워요 니트가 부드럽고 돟네요 비숑인데 털땜시 큰거 샀는데 잘 맞아요 목 부분이 넓어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: So pretty and cute! The knit is soft and nice. Even though my Bichon has a lot of fur, I got the larger size and it fits well. The neck part is nice and roomy!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
느무 이쁩니다~
입혀놓고 가족모두 박수치며 빵 터졌습니다^^
reviews.content_en: So pretty~ When I put it on my pup, the whole family clapped and burst out laughing^^

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content_en: So cute!! 🤎 Looks like a Christmas fairy ㅎㅎㅎ
